comment: EXPERIMENTAL Track B (LWS) Databox deployment preset (ADR-0024 §2, DBX-09 scaffold).
This is a SEPARATE top-level config, not a runtime toggle: CSS 7.1.9 has no feature flag
(DBX-01 §7), so experimental isolation IS choosing this preset at server-assembly time.
It layers the fail-closed Databox component seams over the standard Track A default config.
The default (Track A / production) config MUST NOT import the Databox experimental components;
a Track A deployment is provably free of this code from its launch config alone (ADR-0024).
Load it via AppRunner config array, e.g. new App from [ 'config/default.json',
Every seam here is a placeholder that fails closed; NOTHING here is graduated or claims LWS
